title: iPhone Unleashed
description: Steve Jobs announces the iPhone, triggering the mobile internet revolution and changing digital behavior permanently.

title: Lehmans Collapse
description: Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy, triggering the 2008 Global Financial Crisis and a decade of 'Great Recession' discourse.

title: Obama Elected
description: Barack Obama becomes the first African American President of the United States, shifting demographics and global political sentiment.

title: Deepwater Horizon
description: The BP oil spill triggers a massive environmental disaster, shifting focus toward deep-sea environmental impacts.

title: Arab Spring
description: Mass pro-democracy protests begin across the Middle East, toppling long-standing regimes and dominating geopolitical discourse.

title: Fukushima Disaster
description: An earthquake and tsunami lead to the Fukushima nuclear meltdown, radically altering global energy geopolitics.

title: OBL Killed
description: US forces kill the al-Qaeda leader Osama bin Laden, fundamentally altering the trajectory of the post-9/11 War on Terror.

title: Higgs Boson
description: CERN announces the discovery of the Higgs boson, a landmark achievement confirming the Standard Model.

title: Obama Re-elected
description: Barack Obama secures a second term, ensuring the continuation of the Affordable Care Act and progressive economic policies.

title: Snowden Leaks
description: Edward Snowden reveals NSA surveillance programs, causing a massive spike in 'Deep State' and 'Privacy' intelligence trends.

title: Crimea Annexed
description: Russia annexes Crimea, signaling the return of large-scale geopolitical conflict and territorial disputes in Europe.

title: Paris Agreement
description: 196 parties at COP21 adopt an international treaty on climate change, shifting environmental policy globally.

title: Brexit Vote
description: The UK votes to leave the EU, a major structural break in global political stability and economic coordination.

title: Trump Elected
description: Donald Trump wins the US Presidency, fundamentally shifting the 'Polarization' and 'Populism' indices globally.

title: US-China Trade War
description: The Trump administration enacts broad tariffs on China, signaling a shift toward nationalist economic policy.

title: CRISPR Twins
description: He Jiankui announces the first gene-edited humans, sparking a massive ethical and scientific 'CRISPR' mention spike.

title: Black Hole Image
description: The Event Horizon Telescope captures the first direct visual evidence of a supermassive black hole.

title: COVID-19 Start
description: First cases of a novel coronavirus identified in Wuhan, the beginning of the largest global health focus in a century.

title: WHO Pandemic
description: The WHO officially declares a Global Pandemic, leading to total dominance of science-related intelligence data.

title: Biden Elected
description: Joe Biden defeats Donald Trump, briefly stabilizing centrist institutional norms despite high political polarization.

title: Kabul Fall
description: The Taliban capture Kabul as US forces withdraw, ending a two-decade-long military intervention.

title: James Webb Launch
description: The JWST is successfully deployed, revolutionizing astrophysics and space observation capabilities.

title: Ukraine War
description: Full-scale Russian invasion of Ukraine begins, resetting the 'Cold War' and 'Energy' intelligence metrics.

title: ChatGPT Launch
description: OpenAI releases ChatGPT, marking the start of the 'Generative AI' explosion across all scientific and economic domains.

title: SVB Collapse
description: Silicon Valley Bank fails, causing a regional banking panic and massive spikes in 'Contagion' search terms.

title: Israel-Hamas War
description: Conflict begins in Gaza, driving a resurgence in 'Geopolitics' and 'Conflict' mentions across the Intelligence Hub.

title: Milei Wins Argentina
description: Right-wing anarcho-capitalist Javier Milei is elected President of Argentina, signaling a rise in international libertarian populism.

title: EU Farmers Protests
description: Massive agrarian protests erupt across Europe, reflecting a growing conservative working-class backlash to climate policy.
